laws.title: Public Law 22-155 | Department of Education Repealment Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Chronology supports statutory-note treatment at 2 U.S.C. § 1438; the enactment repeals Pub. L. 17-129 and the Department of Education repeal history is retained as a note.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Public Law 17-129 shall be repealed in its entirety, and the United States Department of Education shall cease to exist.
source_evidence: codification/laws/laws/PL-022-155/law.txt: repeal of Public Law 17-129 and abolition of the Department of Education.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch contains `rp-pl017129-codification` in `usc/usc20.xml`, while origin/main does not; the visible XML otherwise still shows only stock title text.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep the DOE repeal history note in place at the report anchor and preserve the branch-only statutory note behavior.
